arts.ttl: Dida backs Milan’s resurgence: “They’ll return to the top, Maignan is the strongest”
arts.sum: Former AC Milan goalkeeper Nelson Dida has expressed confidence in the club's ability to bounce back and compete for top honors, while also praising current shot-stopper Mike Maignan as potentially the world's best. The post Dida backs Milan’s resurgence: “They’ll return to the top, Maignan is the strongest” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
